report_name: White House Overhauls Federal Logging Policy, Mandating Risk-Based, AI-Driven Monitoring

identities.name: Office of Management and Budget (OMB)
identities.description: The White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued Memorandum M-26-14, which rescinds and replaces the M-21-31 logging mandate for U.S. federal agencies.

identities.name: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)
identities.description: Tasked under Memorandum M-26-14 with developing a new "Logging Reference Architecture" to guide federal agencies on implementing risk-based logging and monitoring.

identities.name: Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
identities.description: Designated as a recipient of log data from federal agencies upon request during incident response, as reinforced by Memorandum M-26-14.

identities.name: Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies
identities.description: The group of U.S. federal agencies directly affected by and required to comply with the new logging mandates in Memorandum M-26-14.
